skill.name: openai-whisper
skill.description: Local speech-to-text with the Whisper CLI (no API key).
skill.summary: Local speech-to-text with the Whisper CLI (no API key).
skill.author: mylukin

security_audit.summary: All static findings evaluated as false positives. The skill contains only documentation for the openai-whisper CLI tool. Backtick patterns are markdown inline code formatting for command examples. The URL references OpenAI's official research page. The filesystem reference documents standard ML model caching behavior. No actual security concerns identified.

content.user_title: Transcribe audio files locally with Whisper
content.value_statement: Need to convert speech in audio files to text? This skill provides Claude with local speech-to-text using OpenAI Whisper without requiring an API key or sending audio to external services.
actual_capabilities: Transcribe audio files to text using local Whisper CLI
Translate speech from audio to English text
Support for multiple audio formats (MP3, M4A, WAV, and more)
Configurable model sizes for speed or accuracy tradeoffs
Process audio files locally without internet or API keys
limitations: Requires whisper CLI to be installed on the system
First run downloads ML models to local cache (several GB for larger models)
Processing speed depends on local hardware (CPU/GPU) and model size chosen

use_cases.title: Meeting transcription
use_cases.description: Convert recorded meetings, calls, or interviews to searchable text without uploading audio to external services.

use_cases.title: Content accessibility
use_cases.description: Generate text transcripts or subtitles from video and audio content for better accessibility.

use_cases.title: Local transcription workflow
use_cases.description: Integrate speech-to-text into automated workflows where data privacy prevents cloud processing.

prompt_templates.title: Basic audio transcription
prompt_templates.prompt: Use the whisper CLI to transcribe this audio file to text: /path/to/audio.mp3
prompt_templates.scenario: When you need a simple transcript of an audio file

prompt_templates.title: Generate subtitles
prompt_templates.prompt: Use whisper to transcribe /path/to/video.m4a to SRT subtitle format with timestamps
prompt_templates.scenario: When you need subtitles or captions with timing

prompt_templates.title: Translate non-English audio
prompt_templates.prompt: Use whisper to translate this audio file to English: /path/to/french-interview.m4a
prompt_templates.scenario: When audio is in another language and needs translation

prompt_templates.title: Batch transcription with specific model
prompt_templates.prompt: Use whisper with the medium model to transcribe /path/to/podcast.mp3 and output as both TXT and SRT files to ./transcripts/
prompt_templates.scenario: When you need specific output formats with optimized settings

Let me show you a concrete example.

best_practices: Use the turbo model for fastest results when accuracy is less critical
Use larger models (medium, large) for improved accuracy on technical or specialized content
Store audio files in a dedicated folder and specify clear output directories
anti_patterns: Do not expect real-time streaming transcription (Whisper CLI processes entire files)
Do not use on extremely noisy audio without preprocessing (results will be poor)
Do not assume the whisper binary is installed (document installation requirements for users)

faq.question: How do I install Whisper CLI?
faq.answer: On macOS, install with: brew install openai-whisper. Other installation methods are available on the Whisper project GitHub page.

faq.question: What audio formats does Whisper support?
faq.answer: Whisper supports common formats including MP3, M4A, WAV, FLAC, OGG, and WebM audio tracks from video files.

faq.question: How accurate is Whisper transcription?
faq.answer: Accuracy varies by model size. Turbo is fast with good accuracy. Large models offer the highest accuracy but require more processing time.

faq.question: Does this work offline?
faq.answer: Yes, Whisper runs entirely locally after the initial model download. No internet connection or API key is required.

faq.question: Can it translate from other languages to English?
faq.answer: Yes, use the --task translate option to transcribe non-English audio directly to English text.

faq.question: How long does transcription take?
faq.answer: Processing time depends on audio length, model size, and your hardware. Real-time factor typically ranges from 0.5x to 10x depending on settings.
